name: ELECTRO SENSORS INC
sic_description: Industrial Instruments For Measurement, Display, and Control
summary: Electro-Sensors, Inc. (ESI) manufactures and sells industrial production monitoring and process control systems. Products include speed monitoring systems, temperature sensors, vibration monitors, belt alignment monitors, tilt switches, and hazard monitoring systems (Electro-Sentry and HazardPRO). ESI serves industries including grain/feed/milling, bulk materials, food products, ethanol, and power generation. The company sells domestically and internationally through internal sales teams, manufacturers' representatives, and distributors, shipping to 21 countries in 2025.
